channel.title: Mangala Express on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Mangala Express on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Spotted on the Mangala Express
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: December 30, 2011.

Spotted while traveling on the Mangala Express, from Ernakulum in Kerala to Panvel near Mumbai.

From the window

A continual backdrop of green, of coconut trees, of bill- and graffiti- covered walls, small colorful buildings with peeling paint, and lines of drying laundry. Signs and messages in indecipherable Malayalam.
